zh.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea是Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea和Elena de Orru di Gunale的女兒，出生在義大利薩德尼亞奧利斯塔諾阿波亞。她於1155年與Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1175年在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea是Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea和Elena de Orru di Gunale的女儿，出生在意大利薩德尼亞奧利斯塔諾阿波亞。她于1155年与Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1175年在意大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Eléanora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea was born in Arborea, Oristano, Sardinia, Italy as the daughter of Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea and Elena de Orru di Gunale. She married Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo in 1155. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1175, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea est née à Arborea, Oristano, Sardegna, Italie, fille de Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea et Elena de Orru di Gunale. Elle a épousé Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo en 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1175, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea wurde in Arborea, Oristano, Sardinien, Italien, als Tochter von Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea und Elena de Orru di Gunale geboren. Sie hat 1155 Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1175 in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea è nata il nel Arborea, Oristano, Sardegna, Italia come figlia di Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea e Elena de Orru di Gunale. Lei sposato Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo nel 1155. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1175, nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di ArboreaはイタリアサルデグナオリスタノアルボアアでGonario II de Serra, Judge of ArboreaとElena de Orru di Gunaleの娘として生まれた。1155年にManfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1175年にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea(은)는 이탈리아 사르데그나 오리스탠오 아볼이에서 Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea(와)과 Elena de Orru di Gunale의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1155년 Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea nasceu em Arborea, Oristano, Sardegna, Itália filha de Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea e Elena de Orru di Gunale. Ela casou-se com Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo em 1155. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1175, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea родилась в местности арбореа, ористано, сардегна, Италия. Её родителей звали Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea и Elena de Orru di Gunale. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo в 1155 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1175 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Donna Eléanora di Arborea nació en Arborea, Oristano, Sardegna, Italia como hija de Gonario II de Serra, Judge of Arborea y Elena de Orru di Gunale. Se casó con Manfred I del Vasto 1st Marquis de Saluzzo en 1155. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1175, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.
